[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001000 1
1 0000000 a
2 1100000 2
3 1010111 5
4 0001011 3
5 1101101 5
6 0010100 2
7 1010011 4

70 07 0010000 1

71 17 0000000 a match 1

72 27 0000100 1
